project_info.name: FATELYN
project_info.description: Marketing landing page with interactive, clickable mobile app screens rendered within realistic phone-frame mockups. Focus on lifestyle motivation, 3D/glassmorphism, and a luxury mystical aesthetic.

theme_and_archetype.aesthetic: Modern new gen, 3D view, glass-morphism, floating cosmic elements, editorial premium feel.
theme_and_archetype.core_directive: Ensure store approval by adding disclaimers ('For guidance & self-reflection only'). No fortune-telling gimmicks.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4A853] text-[#0A0A0F] font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#F4D68C] transition-all hover:scale-105 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,168,83,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[rgba(212,168,83,0.5)] text-[#D4A853] rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[rgba(212,168,83,0.1)] transition-all
buttons.glass: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 hover:bg-white/10 transition-all

cards.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1A1420]/60 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-white focus:border-[#D4A853] focus:outline-none py-2 w-full transition-colors
inputs.calendar: Shadcn based customized with dark mode and gold accents

components.disclaimer: text-xs text-[#A0A0A0] italic text-center mt-4 opacity-70

screens.name: 0. Landing Page (Web)
screens.layout: Full width viewport, cosmic background, gold accents.
sections: Hero: FATELYN logo, Tagline, 'Download Now' CTA, 3D floating phone mockups.
Features Grid: Glassmorphic bento box showing Quest, Compatibility, Chart.

screens.name: 1. Splash / Onboarding (App)
screens.details: Animated cosmic intro, logo reveal. 4 swipeable cards for 'Astrology + Motivation'.

screens.name: 2. Auth (App)
screens.details: Email/Phone input, Google/Apple social buttons. Gold accented inputs.

screens.name: 3. Birth Details Wizard (App)
screens.details: Step-by-step: Name -> Gender -> DOB (Calendar) -> Time -> Location.

screens.name: 4. Home Dashboard (App)
screens.details: Personalized greeting, Moon phase widget, Insight of the day, 4 quick access glass cards, Motivational quote.

screens.name: 5. My Chart / Details (App)
screens.details: Horizontal scroll tabs: Astro Details, Birth Chart (D1-D60), Vimshottari Dasha, Planetary Positions. 3D rendered chart visual.

screens.name: 6. Friends & Compatibility (App)
screens.details: List of friends, 'Add Friend' button. Detailed report screen with % bars for Respect, Harmony, Trust.

screens.name: 7. Milestone Tracker (App)
screens.details: Vertical timeline of events. 'Add Milestone' modal. Favorable time calculation.

screens.name: 8. Quest AI Q&A (App)
screens.details: Chat interface. Category chips. Input for question. AI response with gold border and feedback buttons.

screens.name: 9. Gochar / Panchang (App)
screens.details: Tabs for Panchang, Lagna Chart, Gochar. Clean data grids.

screens.name: 11. Subscription & Billing (App)
screens.details: Premium plans comparison. Stripe sandbox integration test UI. Purchase history.

screens.name: 12. Settings (App)
screens.details: List view: Language (EN/HI), Biometrics toggle, Notifications, Delete Account.

global_rules: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Add 'For guidance & self-reflection only — not a substitute for professional advice' disclaimer at the bottom of insight screens.
Do not use transparent backgrounds under header text; use backdrop-blur glassmorphism.
Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings.
